chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 684 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.5764/2023 (S/A) 11.03.2024 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate is holding brief for Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, learned Counsel for applicants, and withdrawing this miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
